CONTENT.Career: In May 2016 Zolinski joined SC Paderborn 07 on a three-year contract from TSG Neustrelitz.In September 2020, having been released by SC Paderborn upon the expiration of his contract in July, Zolinski moved to 2. Bundesliga side FC Erzgebirge Aue. He signed a three-year contract.
CONTENT.Style of play: Before his move to SC Paderborn, Zolinski was deployed as a right-back but then started playing as a striker.
CONTENT.External links: Ben Zolinski at SoccerwayBen Zolinski at fussballdaten.de (in German)

SUMMARY: Ben Zolinski (born 3 May 1992) is a German professional footballer who plays as a right winger.
